data.title: RED: Add tests for --min-children and --max-children filtering in sprint-list-epics.sh
data.description:
## Summary
Add 5 new test functions to tests/scripts/test-sprint-list-epics.sh that exercise the new --min-children=N and --max-children=N flags. Tests must fail RED because the flags don't exist yet.

## Tests to Write
- test_min_children_filters_zero_child_epics: --min-children=1 excludes epics with 0 children
- test_max_children_zero_shows_only_zero_child: --max-children=0 shows only 0-child epics
- test_max_children_zero_set_check: critical — verifies 0 is not treated as unset (${var+x} pattern)
- test_min_children_backward_compat: no flags = existing behavior unchanged
- test_flags_combined_with_all: --all + --min-children work together

Each test creates its own isolated ephemeral tracker via mktemp -d with trap cleanup.

## File Impact
- tests/scripts/test-sprint-list-epics.sh (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] 5 new test functions exist
  Verify: grep -cE '^test_min_children_filters_zero_child_epics\(\)|^test_max_children_zero_shows_only_zero_child\(\)|^test_max_children_zero_set_check\(\)|^test_min_children_backward_compat\(\)|^test_flags_combined_with_all\(\)' tests/scripts/test-sprint-list-epics.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] New tests fail RED against current script
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-sprint-list-epics.sh 2>&1 | grep -E 'test_min_children_filters.*FAIL|test_max_children_zero_shows.*FAIL'
